description.value: Aura moderate transmutation; CL 7th; Slot shoulders; Price 14,000 gp; Weight 1 lb. DESCRIPTION Subtle, indefinable shapes ripple and flow when this deep blue cloak moves, seemingly devouring any light falling upon it. Once per day at the wearerâs command, two large gray tentacles emerge from the cloak near the shoulders. Each tentacle can make a natural attack that deals 1d6 points of bludgeoning damage, assuming the wear is Medium (the damage of the tentacles scales by size of the wearer as a tentacle natural attack ). The tentacles have 10-foot reach and the grab monster special ability. In addition, the wearer gains a +4 competence bonus on grapple maneuver checks with the tentacles. The tentacles last for 1 minute. CONSTRUCTION REQUIREMENTS Feats Craft Wondrous Item, polymorph self; Cost 7,000 gp.
